summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Mobile Shop Inventory & Catalog Web App. All backend APIs (11/11) and frontend features working perfectly. Successfully tested home page with 9 seeded products, search/filter functionality, product detail pages with WhatsApp integration, and full admin CRUD operations.
passed_tests: Backend API: All 11 endpoints (100% success rate)
Home page loads with 9 seeded products correctly
Brand filter chips toggle and filter products
Price range slider filters products by price
Clear filters button resets all filters
Product cards link to product detail pages
Product detail page shows complete product info
WhatsApp enquiry button generates correct link with number 7404693476
Admin page accessible and shows products in table
Add Product dialog and creation functionality
All CRUD operations integrate with backend APIs
Dark mode with glassmorphism effects working
